_comment: Lockfile coupling this package's benchmark comparability to the haid VERSION the data-only benchmark repo's CI pins. See ADR-0005 and scripts/check_benchmark_pin.py. DO NOT hand-edit the hashes: run `python scripts/check_benchmark_pin.py --update` after an intentional change to an anchor ladder or the combiner config, then bump `pinned_haid_version` here AND the `pip install haid==X` pins in dv-hart/haid-benchmark's validate.yml + build.yml to the release that ships the change.
